# External Reference Documents

Place external reference documents here for ArcKit to read.

## Supported Formats

- PDF documents (architectural decisions, vendor documentation)
- Images (diagrams, schemas)
- SQL files (database schemas)
- Markdown (requirements specifications)
- Text files

## Usage

1. Place documents in this directory
2. Re-run ArcKit commands to incorporate the external content
3. Documents will be referenced in generated artifacts
